summary: End-to-end validation of Angel House Cleaning review/admin system. All 21 backend pytest tests pass (review submission + routing, validation, admin JWT auth, listing/filter, moderation PATCH, public PII-stripping, contact regression). Brute-force 5-attempt lockout verified via ad-hoc script (5x401 → 429). CRITICAL frontend bug discovered and fixed: App.js had routes referencing ReviewsPage/AdminLoginPage/AdminReviewsPage without importing them, causing React to fail to mount (blank screen on all pages). After fix, frontend review-page flow and admin-login→moderation-dashboard flow both work.
action_items: No outstanding action items. Review moderation database contains a few TEST_/UITEST_ entries (approved/rejected/pending). Owner can delete via Mongo or by rejecting them in the admin UI.
critical_code_review_comments: App.js previously used ReviewsPage/AdminLoginPage/AdminReviewsPage without importing them — silent React runtime crash (blank screen, no console error in headless Chromium). Fixed by adding missing imports. E1 should add eslint 'no-undef' or CI type-check to catch this class of regression.

auth.py stores the brute-force counter in an in-process dict, which resets on backend restart and does not cover multi-worker deployments. Acceptable per the inline docstring for a single-site use case, but worth noting if scaling.

/api/admin/login response schema has hardcoded expiresInHours=12 but the actual TTL is in auth.py (TOKEN_TTL_HOURS). If one changes, the other must too — consider sourcing both from a single constant.
email_service.send_review_notification is a best-effort fire-and-forget; current code correctly swallows errors so the user never sees a failure. No change needed, just confirmed.
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/App.js (added missing imports for ReviewsPage, AdminLoginPage, AdminReviewsPage)

success_rate.frontend: 100% of tested flows (reviews submit+routing, admin login+dashboard render, filter pending, logout)

seed_data_creation: Created several TEST_/UITEST_ reviews via live API during testing (Alice 5★ approved, Bob 4★ pending, Carol 2★ rejected, Dana 5★ pending, Evan 2★ pending). Plus one TEST_Contact regression entry in contacts collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully validated (pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_reviews_admin.py — run with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env var). Frontend: only live admin moderation click-flow (approve/reject button click on a specific pending item) not exercised by Playwright due to selector collision with list container id 'admin-review-list'; moderation PATCH endpoints verified in backend tests so product is sound. If you re-test, filter by specific test-ids like [data-testid^='admin-review-'] and exclude 'admin-review-list'. 5-attempt lockout test restarts backend (`sudo supervisorctl restart backend`) — run it last or in isolation.
rca of the issue: ROOT CAUSE (fixed): /app/frontend/src/App.js declared Routes for /reviews, /admin/login, /admin/reviews using components ReviewsPage/AdminLoginPage/AdminReviewsPage that were never imported. webpack-dev-server reported 'Compiled successfully' because CRA does not fail on undefined JSX references at build time, but at runtime React threw and crashed the render tree before the error boundary — manifesting as an entirely blank page on every route (only the 'Made with Emergent' overlay visible). FIX: added the three missing `import` lines. VERIFIED: /reviews, /admin/login, /admin/reviews all render, Client Feedback nav link visible, admin nav link correctly absent, 5-star+consent submission shows Google CTA, 2-star submission shows follow-up 'Call Us' CTA, admin login stores JWT at localStorage.angel_admin_token, /admin/reviews lists pending reviews with PII + Approve/Reject/Follow-up buttons.
